title:
U.S. Consumer Price Index
(CPI) Report
text: Consumer Price Index is one of the most powerful economical market-movers. A higher than expected reading may be a bearish sign for the U.S. dollar as it indicates that inflationary pressures are building up.
text-bold: Traders are holding their breath: how will the U.S. dollar behave once the CPI figures are published?
asterisk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid from 11:30 to 13:30 GMT.
note-text: You can find the latest market overviews and forecasts on the IQ Option blog.
